use_cases: Display user notifications with avatars in a dropdown popover
Show notification count status with animated ping indicator
Allow users to clear individual or all notifications
Provide timestamp context for notification items
Serve as a notification center in navigation headers
ai_summary: A notification bell component with a dropdown popover that displays notification items with user avatars, messages, and timestamps. Features a blinking status indicator, clear all functionality, and scrollable notification list. Built as a composite component using Avatar, Button, and Popover primitives.
